creator: mazhe@alkumuna.eu
text:
Created attachment 147339
Patch to 2.6.8.36, keep default MASTERSITES

Hi,

As I'm often getting noscript errors, I checked and the port version (2.6.6.1, november 2012 at least, according to moz ftp) seems a bit outdated (last is 2.6.8.41 according to https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/noscript/?src=search).

Here is the thing: relying on moz archives, I'm only able to bump it to 2.6.8.36 (first patch) as it it the last available version using port's Makefile.xpi infra (strangely, you don't see the latest version here : ftp://ftp.mozilla.org/pub/mozilla.org/addons/722/, but they are available on addons.mozilla.com...)

Switching MASTER_SITES to the upstream url would allow us to bump to 2.6.8.41, but would that be wanted?
